summary.key_theme: 市場高度關注 Meta 為擴張 AI 基礎設施而考慮進行大規模股權融資所引發的稀釋疑慮與資本支出壓力。

bullish.title: Meta Platforms (META): One of the Best Big Company Stocks to Buy Right Now
bullish.reason: 分析師維持正面評級，認為 Meta 在大型科技股中具備長期投資價值，基本面依然強勁。

bullish.title: Morgan Stanley flags four emerging products to turn Meta into an ’AI winner’
bullish.reason: 摩根士丹利指出 Meta 具備四項潛在 AI 產品，有望將其轉型為 AI 領域的贏家，提升長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Meta Wants AI Agents to Become Its Next Ad Business
bullish.reason: Meta 推出企業級 AI 代理服務，旨在實現廣告業務之外的營收多元化，為未來獲利開闢新路徑。

bullish.title: The 4 Best "Magnificent Seven" Stocks to Buy Now
bullish.reason: 市場觀點認為 Meta 目前股價遭到低估，屬於「七巨頭」中具備買入吸引力的標的。

bullish.title: Meta, Google Could Be Among Winners As FCC Proposes New Undersea Cable Rules Targeting China Risk
bullish.reason: FCC 新規限制中國風險，有利於 Meta 等美國科技巨頭在海底電纜基礎設施上的競爭優勢。

bearish.title: Meta weighs big equity raising to finance AI infrastructure, FT reports
bearish.reason: 此為多篇報導之核心，Meta 考慮透過發行股票籌集數百億美元以資助 AI 建設，引發市場對股權稀釋及資本支出過高的擔憂。

bearish.title: Meta Investor Dumps Shares After AI Fundraising Report, Says Shareholders Don't Want 'Drunken Sailors' Spending
bearish.reason: 知名投資人 Stephanie Link 減持一半持股，批評公司在 AI 上的支出如同「醉酒的水手」，反映機構投資人對利潤率下滑的恐懼。

bearish.title: Meta Platforms (META) Declines More Than Market: Some Information for Investors
bearish.reason: 受融資消息影響，Meta 單日股價下跌 5.51%，表現弱於大盤，顯示市場情緒轉趨負面。

bearish.title: Meta Stock Is Getting Hit Hard. But Where Will It Be in 3 Years?
bearish.reason: 儘管廣告業務強勁，但公司激進的 AI 支出計畫導致市場對其短期獲利能力的質疑加劇。

neutral.title: Nasdaq Posts Worst Drop Since April 2025, S&P 500 And Dow Drop As Strong Jobs Data Ignites Rate Hike Bets
neutral.reason: 整體市場因就業數據強勁引發升息預期而下跌，Meta 股價波動部分受宏觀環境影響。

neutral.title: Trade Tracker: Bill Baruch trims Meta
neutral.reason: 投資人進行常規的部位調整（減碼），屬於正常的投資組合管理行為。

neutral.title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire triples stake in newspaper giant
neutral.reason: 提及 Meta 過去在廣告市場的競爭地位，對目前股價無直接影響。
